attributes.action: Rejoin the EU Single Market and Restore Freedom of Movement
attributes.additional_details:
Rejoining the single market would reduce trade barriers for businesses, especially small and medium-sized firms, by removing customs checks and regulatory friction. This would help lower costs, improve supply chains and support the economy

Restoring freedom of movement would allow people to live, work and study in Europe a lot easier, allowing to address labour shortages in key sectors like health and agriculture.
attributes.background: I would want the UK government and parliament to take practical steps towards rejoining the European Union single market and Restore freedom of movement, because these measures would significantly benefit the economic, social and cultural benefits.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749128
